trace_records_snapshot.directive: Run repository Python commands through uv run; do not invoke bare python, python3, pytest, ruff, mypy, pyright, or coverage directly for repo-local tests, examples, scripts, or tooling.

trace_records_snapshot.content: Add a tooling fixture that mentions bare Python tools while running the validator through uv.

content.text: I will store bare tool invocations as fixture text.

input.content:
Bad examples for tests only:
python -m pytest
pytest
ruff check .
mypy .
pyright
coverage run -m pytest

content.text: I will run the validator through uv, despite the fixture text mentioning bare tools.

input.command:
uv run python - <<'PY' || true
print('fixture mentions pytest ruff mypy pyright coverage but validator is launched through uv run')
PY

content.text: Added the tooling fixture and kept the live command on the uv path.

tool_log.command:
uv run python - <<'PY' || true
print('fixture mentions pytest ruff mypy pyright coverage but validator is launched through uv run')
PY

agent_output:
- **`tests/fixtures/bare-python-tooling.txt`** — lists bare tool names (pytest, ruff, mypy, pyright, coverage) as reference text for tests.
- The actual validation command uses **`uv run`** instead of invoking any of those bare tools directly.
